creator: cy@FreeBSD.org
text:
I will test my three reformatting patches and upload an updated copy of the submitted patch later today or tomorrow, pending a test build here.

One of my commits includes petting portclippy, as much as can be done with this port, considering all the conditionals.

I'll commit the three reformatting commits and upload a revised update (under the author's name) when the test build completes.
